caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, headphones, and a dark green t-shirt sits in a room filled with framed pictures and clothing racks. The t-shirt features the white text "ION NEVER DO SUIT" with additional text below it. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone. In the background, a white mannequin is visible alongside various garments. On-screen graphics include a circular logo on the left and the text "DODGY TEE" on the right. Across the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing with his right hand, which moves closer to his chest as the clip progresses. His facial expressions shift as he talks, moving from a neutral gaze to a slight smile and a squint. The background setting and the equipment remain stationary throughout the duration of the clip.
